All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AlwaysRetryPredicate
 
BackoffStrategy
Defines the contract for calculating delays between retry attempts.
BackoffStrategyType
 
CheeseAspect
 
CheeseRetry
Enables automatic retry logic on methods.
CheeseRetryAutoConfiguration
 
CheeseRetryCallable<T>
 
CheeseRetryConfigurationException
 
CheeseRetryCoreApplication
 
CheeseRetryExecutorException
 
CheeseRetryRunnable
 
CoreRetryExecutor
 
ExceptionConstants
 
ExponentialBackoffStrategy
 
FixedBackoffStrategy
 
JitteredExponentialBackoffStrategy
Exponential backoff with jitter.
NeverRetryPredicate
Deprecated.
Prefer not applying @CheeseRetry at all, or use AlwaysRetryPredicate / TypeBasedRetryPredicate to describe explicit retry behavior.
RetryExecutor
 
RetryPolicy
Defines a retry policy that governs how and when retry attempts should be made.
RetryPolicyFactory
Factory for building RetryPolicy instances from the CheeseRetry annotation metadata.
RetryPredicate
Defines the contract for determining whether a failed operation should be retried based on the exception that was thrown.
RetryPredicateType
 
TypeBasedRetryPredicate
